entry.title: Breaking the Single-Wallet Nonce Ceiling: An Account-Pool Architecture for High-Throughput EVM Transaction Submission
entry.summary: On an EVM chain, each account submits through a strictly sequential nonce — a throughput ceiling and a head-of-line-blocking hazard. walletsforce treats a set of signer accounts as N independent nonce lanes to break that ceiling. An academic walkthrough of its design.
